scripts.check: npm run check -w @furniture/mvp && npm run check:build
scripts.check:build: npm run build && npm run bundle:functions && node scripts/verify-build.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev .wrangler/dist/public --binding RUNTIME_SCHEMA_INIT=true --binding ADMIN_TOKEN=dev-admin-token --compatibility-date=2026-06-28 --persist-to=.wrangler/state
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run bundle:functions && npx wrangler pages deploy .wrangler/dist/public --project-name=furniture-platform-v2
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply furniture-platform-v2 --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply furniture-platform-v2 --remote
scripts.smoke:core: npm run smoke:packages && npm run smoke:suppliers && npm run smoke:advisor
scripts.smoke:deferred: npm run smoke:ai && npm run smoke:whatsapp && npm run smoke:project && npm run smoke:orchestrator && npm run smoke:e2e && npm run smoke:hardening
scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke:core && npm run smoke:phase41:a && npm run smoke:phase42:b && npm run smoke:phase43 && npm run smoke:payment-integrity
